summary: Iteration 6 testing for DRY/LIVE mode toggle feature completed successfully. All backend endpoints pass (14/14 tests). Frontend mode toggle UI renders correctly with DRY/LIVE buttons, mode badge, and proper disable states. LIVE mode correctly rejected by backend since Binance client cannot connect from preview environment.

issues: Toast notification overlay can temporarily block button clicks when appearing - known issue from iteration 5

critical_code_review_comments: LIVE button disabled condition only checks binance_keys_configured, not binance_connected. This is correct behavior - button is clickable but backend rejects switch if client not connected.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all mode toggle UI elements render correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: DRY/LIVE mode toggle feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/bot/mode returns {mode, binance_connected, binance_keys_configured}; PUT /api/bot/mode switches mode. LIVE mode rejected from preview environment (Binance API restricted). Frontend: Config page shows Trading Mode section with DRY/LIVE buttons, mode badge, and warning messages about Binance connection.
mocked_api_note: Binance API cannot connect from preview server (restricted location). LIVE mode toggle UI exists and backend endpoint works, but LIVE mode cannot be tested end-to-end with real Binance. DRY mode is fully functional.
